memoryArtifacts.headline: Throckmorton Lineage - Norfolk Visitation
memoryArtifacts.description: from pages 282-283 of The Visitation of Norfolk, made and taken by William Harvey, Clarencieux king of arms, anno 1563, enlarged with another visitation made by Clarenceux Cooke, with many other descents; and also the visitation made by John Raven, Richmond, anno 1613. Edited by Walter Rye. London, 1891.

zh.Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England: 英國武斯特斯爾洛可莫頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Giles de Throckmorton於1309年出生在英國瓦維其可爾庫頓時，他的父親Robert de Throckmorton III38歲，母親Joan de Weston40歲。他與Agnes Fraunceys結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1360年12月在英國武斯特斯爾洛可莫頓享年51歲，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾洛可莫頓。

zh-hans.Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England: 英国武斯特斯爾洛可莫頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Giles de Throckmorton于1309年出生在英国瓦維其可爾庫頓时，他的父亲Robert de Throckmorton III38岁，母亲Joan de Weston40岁。他与Agnes Fraunceys结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1360年12月在英国武斯特斯爾洛可莫頓享年51岁，埋葬在英国武斯特斯爾洛可莫頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Throckmorton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Throckmorton in Worcestershire, which is named with Old English throc ‘beam bridge’ + mere ‘pool’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’.

History: The Throckmorton family was powerful and influential in England in Tudor times, but has since almost died out there. American bearers of the name trace their descent from either John Throckmorton (1601–1684) of New England or Robert Throckmorton (1609–1663) of VA.

nameMeanings.name: Giles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Much altered English vernacular form of the Late Latin name Aegidius, from Greek Aigidios (a derivative of aigidion ‘kid, young goat’), via Old French Gide. It was the name of an 8th‐century saint who, according to tradition, was an Athenian citizen who fled to Provence because he could not cope with the fame and adulation caused by his power to work miracles, in particular by healing the lame and crippled. This was not a particularly common name in the Middle Ages and its use seems to have been confined to certain families and localities.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Giles de Throckmorton was born in 1309, in Coughton, Warwickshire, England, his father, Robert de Throckmorton III, was 38 and his mother, Joan de Weston, was 40. He married Agnes Fraunceys. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in December 1360, in Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England, at the age of 51, and was buried in Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Giles de Throckmorton est né en 1309, à Coughton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Throckmorton III, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Joan de Weston, avait 40 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Fraunceys. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en décembre 1360, à Throckmorton, Worcestershire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Throckmorton, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Giles de Throckmorton 1309 in Coughton, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Throckmorton III 38 und seine Mutter Joan de Weston 40. Er hat Agnes Fraunceys geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb im Dezember 1360 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England und wurde in Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Giles de Throckmorton è nato il nel 1309 nel Coughton, Warwickshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Throckmorton III, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Joan de Weston, aveva 40 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Fraunceys. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel dicembre 1360, nel Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England.

ja.Throckmorton, Worcestershire, England: イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアスロクモートン

ja.Newton, Staffordshire, England: イギリススタフォードシュアイアニュートン
ja.lifeSummary: Giles de Throckmortonが1309年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアコウトンで生まれた時，父Robert de Throckmorton IIIは38歳，母Joan de Westonは40歳であった。Agnes Fraunceysと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1360年12月にイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアスロクモートンで51歳で死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアスロクモートンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Giles de Throckmorton(이)가 1309년 영국 워윅실르 코우그h턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Throckmorton III(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan de Weston(은)는 40세였다. 그는 Agnes Fraunceys(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1360년 12월 영국 워스스터실르 스록모르턴에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 스록모르턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Giles de Throckmorton nasceu em 1309, em Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Throckmorton III, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Weston, tinha 40 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Fraunceys. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em dezembro de 1360, em Throckmorton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Throckmorton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Giles de Throckmorton родился в 1309 г. в местности коугтон, варвиккшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Throckmorton III было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Weston, 40. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Fraunceys. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер декабрь 1360 г. в местности троккмортон, ворсестиршир, Англия в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности троккмортон, ворсестиршир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Giles de Throckmorton nació en 1309, en Coughton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Robert de Throckmorton III, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Joan de Weston, tenía 40 años. Se casó con Agnes Fraunceys. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en diciembre de 1360, en Throckmorton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 51 años, y fue sepultado en Throckmorton, Worcestershire, Inglaterra.
